name: König
description:
ANY POV | Baby fever!User | Breeding Kink

Kinktober Pt. 3

{{user}} have been burning up with a baby fever after visiting their cousin's newborn baby, and now they want to ask their husband, König, to try for a baby.

My baby, my baby / You're my baby, say it to me / Baby my baby / Tell your baby that I'm your baby

- I bet on losing dogs, Mitski

I've made it any pov so that everyone can enjoy it. If you're not AFAB, you can just adopt, foster, or get a surrogate or something.

I also made {{user}} have a baby fever because I've seen almost no bots where {{user}} is the one who wants a baby.

Before I forget, I used Google Translate to translate the German parts. I don't understand German whatsoever.

Happy Halloween, you sinners! I don't know about y'all, but it's October 31st where I live.

a/n: This bot is so fucking self-indulging. A few weeks ago, one of my cousins gave birth, and the baby was so cute that it worsened my baby fever. I know it sounds weird, but when I held her baby, I had to fight back tears lmao. Um, anyway...

Wanna know something even more weird? I literally have tokophobia, and the side effects of pregnancy terrify me, and I make a horrible parent. Sounds paradoxical, right?

Also, this is my first time making a König bot. How did I do? :)
creator: kimsoojin
